backstory.original: A proud daughter of Clan Undurr and a devout follower of Gorm Gulthyn, the dwarven god of vigilance and duty. She spent fifteen years in the city of Ironmaster, in Icewind Dale, overseeing and protecting her family's investment in the city's lucrative mining operations. However, she saw little action and feared that her talents were being squandered. She has recently found a home within a budding organization called the Order of the Gauntlet, which vigilantly guards against the rise of evil in all its forms.
backstory.display: 她是恩杜尔家族的骄傲，也是矮人的警戒和职责之神贡姆·葛辛的虔诚信徒。她在冰风谷的精铁城待了 15 年，监督并保护她家族在该城利润丰厚的采矿投资。然而她在那里没有用武之地，因此开始担心自己的才能会被浪费。她最近加入了一个新成立的组织，这个组织被称为铁手教团，他们警惕地防范着各种形式的邪恶崛起。

description.original: Barrowin smashes the nearest enemy with her mighty warhammer.
description.display: 布朗温用她的强力战锤猛击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Barrowin infuses herself with holy energy, shielding and buffing her attack cooldown.
description.display: 布朗温为自己注入神圣能量，获得护盾并降低攻击冷却时间。

longDescription.original: Barrowin infuses herself with holy energy, shielding allies in her column and decreasing her own attack cooldown by 2 seconds.
longDescription.display: 布朗温为自己注入神圣能量，为她所在列的同伴提供护盾，并使自己的攻击冷却时间降低 2 秒。

description.original: Barrowin causes adjacent Champions to do additional damage whenever she attacks.
description.display: 每当布朗温攻击时，使相邻的勇士能造成额外伤害。

description.original: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her whenever she attacks.
description.display: 每当布朗温攻击时，治疗与她同列的勇士。

description.desc: Barrowin increases the damage of Champions behind her by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation who has an equal or higher base attack cooldown, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每位基本攻击冷却时间多于等于布朗温的勇士，均使她身后勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Barrowin causes Champions behind her to do additional damage based on the number of Champions in the formation with equal or higher attack speed than her.
tipText.display: 依据阵型中攻击速度高于等于自己的勇士数量，布朗温使位于她身后的勇士造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Barrowin has a number of Vigilance stacks equal to the number of Champions in the formation that are either lawful or dwarves. She increases the health of other Champions in the formation by $amount% of her max health for each Vigilance stack.
布朗温的“警戒”堆叠层数相当于阵型中的守序或矮人勇士数量。每层“警戒”均使阵型中其他勇士的生命值提高她的最大生命值的 $amount%。

Barrowin heals Champions in her column, including herself, for $(not_buffed amount) health per second for each stack of Vigilance she has. After Barrowin attacks, her next Healing Word also applies a temporary health bonus of the same amount.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温每秒为同列勇士（包括她自己）治疗 $(not_buffed amount) 点生命值。布朗温攻击后，她的下一个“治愈真言”也会施加等量的临时生命值加成。

tipText.original: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her. Place her in a column that takes a lot of damage!
tipText.display: 布朗温治疗与她同纵队的勇士。将她放置在承受大量伤害的纵队里！

description.desc: Barrowin attacks $amount seconds faster for each stack of Vigilance she has. Additionally, when a Champion that is eligible for Healing Word is hit by an enemy, Barrowin attacks 1 second faster for her next two attacks.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温的攻击速度加快 $amount 秒。此外，当一名能作为“治愈真言”施放对象的勇士被敌人击中时，布朗温的下两次攻击速度提升 1 秒。
Barrowin remembers the largest number of enemies she's had to tank at once in the current area. Blessed Hammer is increased by $amount% multiplied by that number.
布朗温铭记她在当前区域应对的最大敌人数量。“祝福之锤”按此数值以乘数强化 $amount%。
Barrowin's Blessed Hammer is buffed by $amount%
布朗温的“祝福之锤”强化 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin's Blessed Hammer is more effective, causing her allies to do even more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温的祝福之锤效果加强，使她的盟友造成更高伤害。

description.desc: Barrowin's Healing Word is buffed by $amount%
布朗温的“治愈真言”强化 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin's Healing Word is more effective, causing her to heal and shield for even more.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温的治愈真言效果加强，使她提供更有效的治疗和护盾。

description.desc: Barrowin's Blessed Hammer base effect is additively increased by $(amount_per_stack)% for each Vigilance stack she has.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温的“祝福之锤”基础效果以加算方式强化 $(amount_per_stack)%。

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin focuses on lawful and dwarf Champions, boosting Blessed Hammer based on the number of Vigilance stacks she has.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温专注于守序和矮人勇士，依据她堆叠的“警戒”层数来强化祝福之锤。

description.original: Gorm's light shines upon us all.
description.display: 贡姆的圣光照耀着我们所有人。

description.original: You need heals? Get over here, then!
Feel the blessing of Gorm course through you.
description.display: 感受贡姆的祝福穿过你的身体。

description.original: You think yourself weak? Think again!
description.display: 你觉得自己很弱？再想想！

description.original: I can stand with the best of them!
description.display: 我能比肩他们中的最强者！

description.original: You'd think my hammer slow. You'd be mistaken.
description.display: 你要是觉得我的铁锤速度慢，那你就错了。

description.original: It's a prayer to Gorm Gulthyn.
description.display: 这是对贡姆·古辛的祈祷。
翁铎在地下。听明白了吗？

description.original: Clan Undurr does not back down!
I used to do these calculations at home all the time!
description.display: 我以前一直在家里做这些计算！

description.original: Rally under the banner of Clan Undurr!
description.display: 在恩杜尔家族的旗帜下集结！

description.original: Don't go dying on me now. Plenty of work to do.
description.display: 先别急着断气。还有大把活儿要干呢。

character_sheet_details.backstory: A proud daughter of Clan Undurr and a devout follower of Gorm Gulthyn, the dwarven god of vigilance and duty. She spent fifteen years in the city of Ironmaster, in Icewind Dale, overseeing and protecting her family's investment in the city's lucrative mining operations. However, she saw little action and feared that her talents were being squandered. She has recently found a home within a budding organization called the Order of the Gauntlet, which vigilantly guards against the rise of evil in all its forms.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Barrowin grants bonus damage to adjacent Champions whenever she attacks. She also heals Champions in the same column as her.

event_upgrades.name: Healing Word
event_upgrades.description: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her whenever she attacks.
